postalAddress.value: Christchurch Central electorate office, 132b Victoria St, Christchurch Central
postalAddress.notes: Labour profile page lists electorate office street address; also lists Wellington postal address: Freepost PO Box 18 888, Parliament Buildings, Wellington 6160.

donationMethod.notes: No obvious public method found for donating directly to Duncan Webb personally; Labour has online donation page.
